title: agrostis alba var. stricta
intro: Agrostis alba var. stricta, also known as redtop grass or strict redtop, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Agrostis alba var. stricta has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating coughs and respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Agrostis alba var. stricta can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
